expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md cites authoritative snapshot evidence: skill_snapshot/README.md explicitly claims Phase 7 produces developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md derived from P1 + [ANALOG-GATE]. It also cites skill_snapshot/scripts/lib/finalPlanSummary.mjs: extractDeveloperSmokeRows() filters rows containing <P1> or [ANALOG-GATE] and writes context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md. result.md repeats this mapping and marks Expectation 1 as PASS.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md explicitly map the benchmark to phase7 ('Primary phase under test: phase7'). They reference skill_snapshot/SKILL.md and skill_snapshot/reference.md for Phase 7 responsibilities/artifacts (qa_plan_final.md, finalization record, final_plan_summary generation) and connect developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md generation to Phase 7 via finalPlanSummary.mjs. result.md marks Expectation 2 as PASS.
